allow: Bash(wc -l echo "" echo "Remaining console.log (should only be in base.html for the helper itself):" grep -c "console\.log" base.html echo "" echo "Files with console.error (these are kept as-is):" grep -l "console\.error" *.html)
Bash(cd /opt/restaurant-system/accounting/src/accounting/templates echo "=== Console Statement Summary ===" echo "" echo "Files with debug.log:" grep -l "debug\.log" *.html)
Bash(wc -l echo "" echo "Files with console.error (kept as-is):" grep -l "console\.error" *.html)
Bash(echo "=== CHECKING IF DEPRECATED FILES ARE STILL IMPORTED ===" echo "--- invoice.py \(models\) ---" grep -r "from.*_deprecated.*invoice" /opt/restaurant-system/inventory/src --include="*.py")

Bash(echo "=== FILES WITH LOTS OF COMMENTS ===" find /opt/restaurant-system/inventory/src -name "*.py" ! -path "*__pycache__*" -exec sh -c 'count=$\(grep -c ""^[[:space:]]*#"" ""$1"" 2>/dev/null\); if [ ""$count"" -gt 30 ]; then echo ""$1: $count""; fi' _ {} ;)
Bash(echo "=== CONSOLE.LOG STATEMENTS IN HTML ===" grep -rn "console\\.log" /opt/restaurant-system/*/src/*/templates/*.html)
Bash(echo "=== CONSOLE.LOG STATEMENTS IN HTML ===" find /opt/restaurant-system -path "*/templates/*.html" -exec grep -l "console.log" {} ;)

Bash(# Test nginx routing directly docker exec nginx-proxy curl -sI http://integration-hub:8000/health)
Bash(# Test nginx routing for /hub/ and /inventory/ paths echo ""Testing /hub/ path:"" curl -sI http://localhost/hub/health)
Bash(for dir in andy kent laz)
Bash(for user in andy tina jessica kent laz terany)

Bash(git -C /opt/restaurant-system commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix\(hub\): Save vendor_id and item_code in expense item mappings

Bulk mapping endpoint was not storing vendor_id or item_code in the
invoice_item_mapping table, causing the Expense Items page to show
"-" for vendor and item code columns. Also added item_code search
to the expense items filter.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /opt/restaurant-system commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix\(hub\): Use vendor purchase_unit_abbr for Unit column on invoice detail

The template was using units_per_case > 1 to show CS, else EA. This was
wrong for items like Hendricks Gin \(sold per bottle but 6 per case\) which
showed CS instead of EA. Now uses the vendor item''s purchase_unit_abbr
which correctly reflects the actual purchasing unit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /opt/restaurant-system commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix\(hub\): Use price_is_per_unit flag in location price display

The location-prices endpoint assumed invoice unit_price was always a
case cost, causing items priced per unit \(like Hendricks Gin at
$38.20/bottle\) to show $38.20 as case cost and $6.37 as unit cost.
Now uses the price_is_per_unit flag to correctly calculate: per-unit
items show unit_cost = invoice price, case_cost = price * units_per_case.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
